issue_count_template: {{if eq .total 0}}No issues were found.{{else}}{{if eq .total 1}}{{if eq .critical 1}}A single critical severity issue was found.{{end}}{{if eq .high 1}}A single high severity was found.{{end}}{{if eq .medium 1}}A single medium severity issue was found.{{end}}{{if eq .low 1}}A single low severity issue was found.{{end}}{{else}}A total of {{.total}} issues were found: {{if ne .critical 0}}{{if eq .critical 1}}1 critical severity issue{{else}}{{if gt .critical 1}}{{.critical}} critical severity issues{{end}}{{end}}{{if eq (sum .high .medium .low) 1}} and {{else}}, {{end}}{{end}}{{if ne .high 0}}{{if eq .high 1}}1 high severity issue{{else}}{{if gt .high 1}}{{.high}} high severity issues{{end}}{{end}}{{if eq (sum .medium .low) 1}} and {{else}}{{if eq (sum .medium .low) 0}}.{{else}}, {{end}}{{end}}{{end}}{{if ne .medium 0}}{{if eq .medium 1}}1 medium severity issue{{else}}{{if gt .medium 1}}{{.medium}} medium severity issues{{end}}{{end}}{{if eq .low 1}} and {{else}}{{if eq .low 0}}.{{else}}, {{end}}{{end}}{{end}}{{if eq .low 1}}1 low severity issue.{{else}}{{if gt .low 1}}{{.low}} low severity issues.{{end}}{{end}}{{end}}{{end}}
